table.name: vtiger_salary
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_salary` ( `salaryid` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `salary_no` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `amount` decimal(25,8) DEFAULT NULL, `deductions` decimal(25,8) DEFAULT NULL, `net_amount` decimal(25,8) DEFAULT NULL, `salary_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `employeeid` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_salarycf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_salarycf` ( `salaryid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`salaryid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
